proposal1.heroHeadline: Quickcheck is losing 1,000 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's where it vanishes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals manually bleeds time. Switch to 47-second automated perfection.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below are the ongoing hemorrhages affecting Quickcheck's efficiency and bottom line.

problems.title: Time Sink
problems.description: Each manual proposal costs you 2 hours of valuable time. That's time not spent closing deals for Quickcheck.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed opportunities. Every day a proposal is late, Quickcheck risks losing potential clients.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual processes lead to inconsistent branding. This inconsistency can cost Quickcheck client trust and loyalty.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees to draft proposals is expensive. Quickcheck could save thousands by automating this task.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual input leads to errors which can lose clients. Errors in proposals cost Quickcheck credibility and future business.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Resources spent on proposals cannot be used elsewhere. This misallocation is costly for Quickcheck's growth potential.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the answer to all these costly problems.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Current method takes hours per proposal. Our system delivers client-ready proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding varies manually. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns with Quickcheck's brand identity.

solutions.title: Error Elimination
solutions.description: Manual errors are costly. Our system ensures accuracy in every proposal, safeguarding Quickcheck's reputation.

solutions.title: Resource Reallocation
solutions.description: Current method ties up valuable resources. Our system frees up time and talent for more strategic initiatives.

solutions.title: Deal Closure Acceleration
solutions.description: Delayed proposals slow down deals. Our system speeds up proposal delivery, accelerating closure rates for Quickcheck.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Quickcheck's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Quickcheck around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Quickcheck.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Revenue with Quickcheck's Market Insights.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a targeted strategy to convert lost opportunities into loyal customers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Acme Corp loses approximately 20% of potential revenue as visitors leave without converting. This is a critical gap in capturing market share.

problems.title: Inefficient Marketing Spend
problems.description: Without precise targeting, 30% of the marketing budget is wasted on audiences that don't engage. This is money that could be driving actual sales.

problems.title: Poor Customer Retention
problems.description: Acme Corp sees a 25% churn rate, which translates to thousands in lost recurring revenue monthly. Retaining customers is cheaper than acquiring new ones.

problems.title: Brand Awareness Deficit
problems.description: A lack of strong brand presence results in a 15% lower market penetration compared to competitors. Visibility is crucial for growth.

problems.title: Slow Response Times
problems.description: Delayed customer service responses lead to a 10% drop in customer satisfaction. This undermines long-term loyalty and advocacy.

problems.title: Underutilized Digital Channels
problems.description: 40% of potential digital interactions go unutilized, missing out on engaging a tech-savvy audience that prefers online communication.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Quickcheck offers targeted services to address these specific issues.

solutions.title: Market Analysis
solutions.description: Our in-depth analysis identifies key areas for improvement, optimizing your marketing spend and boosting conversions.

solutions.title: Customer Engagement
solutions.description: Enhance retention with personalized engagement strategies that reduce churn and increase lifetime value.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: Strengthen your brand presence with strategic initiatives that improve market penetration and visibility.

solutions.title: Digital Transformation
solutions.description: Leverage digital channels effectively to engage audiences, improving interaction and satisfaction.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Quickcheck is the partner you need for data-driven growth.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Results
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies have consistently delivered increased revenues for our clients.

whyUsCards.title: Custom Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We develop tailored strategies that align with your unique business objectives.

whyUsCards.title: Expert Team
whyUsCards.description: Our team of experts is dedicated to your business success and growth.

whyUsCards.title: Partnership Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with you to ensure our solutions are effectively implemented.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team committed to your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships, with over a decade of experience in driving growth. Specializes in aligning business goals with actionable insights.

process.title: Strategy Development
